name: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU 12POW150
title: MikroTik Hot Swap PSU 12POW150
short_description: Compatible with CCR1072 and CCR2216, 12v 150W AC/DC
description: The MikroTik Hot Swap PSU 12POW150 is a reliable and efficient 12V 150W AC/DC power supply module designed for uninterrupted operation in high-performance networking environments. It is compatible with MikroTik router models CCR1072-1G-8S+, CCR2216-1G-12XS-2XQ, and CRS518-16XS-2XQ-RM, all of which are equipped with two redundant power supplies for maximum reliability. If one unit fails, the second one automatically takes over, ensuring your network equipment continues to run smoothly. The Hot Swap feature allows you to replace a faulty or aging power supply while the device is still running — there’s no need to shut down or reboot the router. This minimizes downtime and helps maintain consistent network performance even in critical environments. Built for durability and easy maintenance, the 12POW150 delivers stable power output and long-lasting reliability. It’s an ideal choice for professional data centers and telecom setups that demand continuous operation without interruptions.

If one unit fails, the second one automatically takes over, ensuring your network equipment continues to run smoothly. The Hot Swap feature allows you to replace a faulty or aging power supply while the device is still running — there’s no need to shut down or reboot the router. This minimizes downtime and helps maintain consistent network performance even in critical environments.
